name: Captrix AI caption generation surface
description: Verifies the hosted-first AI caption generation UI and local fallback messaging without forcing CI to download a model.

planSteps.description: data-testid=generate-captions is visible and says captions use hosted AI first with local browser fallback.
data-testid=transcription-status is visible and explains that captions can be generated with hosted AI or local fallback.
Click data-testid=generate-captions without uploading a video.
The app shows that caption generation needs a loaded clip and does not crash.
